COMMENT: For any initial diagnosis date (INITL_DGNS_DT) after 1/1/2018, this variable indicates whether the 
AJCC 7
th edition or the AJCC 8
th Edition was reported. AJCC 7
th Edition is effective for cancer patients 
diagnosed through 12/31/2017; AJCC 8th Edition is effective for cancer patients diagnosed on or after 
1/1/2018. To support participants that did not have AJCC 8
